description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a predominantly black body accented by cyan-blue highlights and a few purple details. The rifle features a tactical rail on top, a collapsible or adjustable stock at the rear, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The magazine is inserted into the grip, which is marked with cyan-blue stripes, and the overall design is angular and futuristic. The barrel is short and robust, with a squared-off muzzle and no visible suppressor or flash hider. The rifle appears to be constructed mainly from metal and polymer, with a matte and slightly textured finish. Its size and design suggest it is intended for close-quarters urban engagements.
description: A compact, futuristic submachine gun-style rifle with black and cyan-blue accents, featuring a tactical rail, collapsible stock, and vertical foregrip. The design is angular and modern, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the collapsible stock, tactical rail, and cyan-striped grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, vertical foregrip, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the grip and magazine.
